name: EUR/USD

confidence_why: 4H and Daily agree, momentum with the trend, price is at a level
analysis: EUR/USD is leaning down on the 4-hour, 83% conviction. The Daily bias agrees. Volatility is quiet — coiled and choppy. Nearest structure: floor (9.0 pips away). A soft dollar (-0.02% DXY) is a headwind to the read.
watch: Downtrend intact (4H + Daily) — waiting for a pullback to the 8-EMA to go short.

chartist.read: 4H bearish (8/21/55 stack), price under the 8-EMA; choppy. RSI 41.9. Daily bias agrees. Nearest level 1.14 (9.0 pips). Trigger in play.

quant.read: Volatility dead/coiling (4H ATR ~14 pips). No edge in a low-vol mid-range — size would be minimum.

risk.read: Gate CLOSED. Nothing fits the 1% rule right now — the veto holds, capital protected.

trade.read: On standby until a level and a clean trigger appear together.
